title: Epic 16: Installation smooth on all platforms
description: Tested on 3+ platforms, doctor command helps users diagnose issues, pre-built binaries available.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Installation smoothness depends on packaging outputs and platform verification; blocked pending tskl-nqs.1/tskl-nqs.2 outcomes.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added tools/verify_rust_binary.py to smoke-test the release binary (tsk init/doctor in temp repo). Local run succeeded against rust/target/release/taskulus; cross-platform validation still pending.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added tools/verify_installation_suite.py to orchestrate Rust release build + binary verification and optional Python install check (--python). Local run with --skip-python succeeded.

custom.beads_notes:
Plan: record current install status by platform in INSTALL.md; note remaining platform validation for Python/Rust binaries.
Added platform status table to INSTALL.md. macOS local validation recorded; Linux/Windows pending.
Adding a short note in INSTALL.md about PATH/venv for the tsk console script to improve readability.
No further local-only improvements available without cross-platform testing or binary packaging. Remaining work requires Linux/Windows validation or CI/packaging pipeline.
Python install matrix and Rust binaries complete; installation distribution epic satisfied.
